info.title: Sari Tebu API
info.description:
Dokumentasi REST API untuk Sari Tebu, aplikasi POS (Point of Sale) berbasis web. Mencakup pendaftaran akun dengan verifikasi email, manajemen produk, keranjang belanja, sampai proses checkout.

Response selalu dalam format JSON dengan field status: "success" kalau request berhasil, "fail" kalau ada kesalahan dari sisi client (misalnya validasi gagal atau resource-nya nggak ada), dan "error" kalau ada masalah di server yang nggak terduga.

Autentikasi di sini pakai session token yang disimpan di HTTP-only cookie, jadi bukan Bearer token/JWT seperti yang biasa dipakai di banyak API lain. Karena itu kebanyakan endpoint nggak perlu header Authorization.

Untuk ID resource, formatnya pakai prefix sesuai jenisnya, contoh user-xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx atau product-xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx, di mana bagian setelah prefix itu di-generate pakai nanoid (21 karakter).

contact.name: Universitas Mikroskil IF-A Sore Kelompok A

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Sign up, login, dan session management

tags.name: Products
tags.description: Pengelolaan data produk. Memerlukan sesi autentikasi.

tags.name: Cart
tags.description: Keranjang belanja milik pengguna. Memerlukan sesi autentikasi.

tags.name: Transactions
tags.description: Proses checkout dan riwayat transaksi. Memerlukan sesi autentikasi.

price_at_time.description: Product price at the moment of checkout

post.description: Initiate the signup process by providing an email address. A verification code will be sent to the email.

409.description: Email already exists in auth session

delete.description: Cancel and delete the current signup session.

post.description: Verify the email address using the code sent to the email. Requires a valid signup session cookie.
Request a new verification code to be sent to the signup email. Rate limited to 5 requests per 5 minutes.

429.description: Too many requests - rate limit exceeded

post.description: Finalize the signup process by creating a user account. Requires verified email from signup session and automatically creates an auth session.
Authenticate user with email and password. Creates a new auth session. Rate limited to 5 requests per minute.

429.description: Too many login attempts - rate limit exceeded

get.description: Retrieve information about the currently authenticated user. Used to validate active sessions.

delete.description: Logout the current user by deleting the active auth session.

post.description: Initiate password reset process. Always returns success (anti-enumeration), but verification code is only sent if email is registered.

patch.description: Set a new password after email verification.

delete.description: Cancel the ongoing password reset process.

post.description: Verify the email using the code sent. Requires valid password reset session.
Request a new verification code for password reset. Rate limited to 5 requests per 5 minutes.
Start the password update process for authenticated user. Creates a temporary session token.

patch.description: Set a new password after current password verification.

post.description: Verify the user's current password before allowing password change. Rate limited to 5 requests per minute.
Start the email update process. Verification code is sent to the new email address.

patch.description: Apply the email address change after verification.

post.description: Verify the new email address using the code sent.
Request a new verification code for email update. Rate limited to 5 requests per 5 minutes.
Start the account deletion process. Notification email is sent. Rate limited to 3 requests per 10 minutes.

delete.description: Permanently delete the user account. Requires verified password.

post.description: Confirm account deletion by verifying the user's password.

get.description: Retrieve a list of products with optional filtering by name.

post.description: Create a new product in the catalog.

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific product.

patch.description: Partially update a product (at least one field required).

delete.description: Delete a product from the catalog.

get.description: Retrieve all carts for the authenticated user.

post.description: Create a new shopping cart for the authenticated user.

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific cart.

delete.description: Delete a cart and all its items.

post.description: Add a product to a cart or increase quantity if already present.

patch.description: Update the quantity of an item in the cart.

delete.description: Remove a product from the cart.

get.description: Retrieve all transactions for the authenticated user.

post.description: Process a checkout transaction from an existing cart. This empties and deletes the cart, decrements product stock, and creates a transaction record.

404.description: Cart not found or does not belong to the user

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific transaction.
